title: Allows users to submit leave requests for approval.
user_story: As a User, I want Submit a leave request for approval, so that Enable users to manage their leaves efficiently

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a user, when they submit a leave request, then the request is sent for approval within 24 hours.
Given a user, when their leave request is approved, then they receive a notification.

title: Streamlines leave requests, approvals, and tracking, reducing manual work for users.
user_story: As a User, I want Streamline leave requests, approvals, and tracking, so that Reduce manual work

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a user, when they submit a leave request, then the system sends a notification to the approver.
Given an approver, when they receive a leave request, then they can approve or reject it within 24 hours.

title: Allows users to submit leave requests for approval and track their leave balance.
user_story: As a User, I want Submit a leave request for approval, so that Enable users to request time off

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a user, when they submit a leave request, then the request is sent for approval.
Given an approved leave request, when the user checks their balance, then the balance is updated.

title: Enables users to securely log in to the system.
user_story: As a User, I want Secure login, so that Access system securely

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a user, when they enter valid credentials, then they are authenticated.
Given a user, when the system is available, then it is at least 95% of the time.

title: Enables users to have their leave balances updated automatically.
user_story: As a User, I want Have automatic leave balance updates, so that Accurately track leave balances

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a user with existing leave balances, when a leave update occurs, then the leave balance is automatically updated.
Given a user with no existing leave balances, when a new leave is added, then the leave balance is automatically initialized.

title: Enhances system performance and availability to meet high user satisfaction and reduced manual processing goals.
user_story: As a User, I want Experience high system availability and performance, so that Achieve user satisfaction above 4.5/5 with reduced manual processing

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given the system is operational, when the user interacts with it, then the system should be available 95% of the time.
Given a user request, when it is submitted, then the approval time should be under 24 hours.
Given the system is used, when the user provides feedback, then the user satisfaction should be above 4.5/5.
Given manual processes are in place, when the system is optimized, then there should be a 50% reduction in manual processing.

title: Provides users with timely notifications and reports for efficient leave management.
user_story: As a User, I want Receive timely notifications and reports for leave management, so that Enhanced user satisfaction through efficient leave management

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a user, when they submit a leave request, then they receive a notification within 24 hours.
Given a user, when the system is available, then it is accessible 95% of the time.

title: Provides users with timely notifications and reports for leave management.
user_story: As a User, I want Receive notifications and reports for leave management, so that Stay informed about leave approvals and management

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a user, when they submit a leave request, then they receive a notification within 24 hours.
Given a user, when they access the leave management system, then they can view reports on leave history.

title: Allows users to submit leave requests for approval, ensuring timely processing and user satisfaction.
user_story: As a User, I want Submit a leave request for approval, so that Enable users to manage their leave effectively

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a user, when they submit a leave request, then the request is sent for approval within 24 hours.
Given a user, when their leave request is approved, then they receive a notification.

title: Enables users to securely log in to the system.
user_story: As a User, I want Secure login, so that Access system securely

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a user, when they enter valid credentials, then they are authenticated.
Given a user, when the system is available 95% of the time, then the user can access the system.

title: Enables automatic updates to user leave balances.
user_story: As a User, I want Have automatic leave balance updates, so that Accurate leave balance tracking

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a user with existing leave balance, when a leave is approved, then the leave balance is updated automatically.

title: Enhance system performance and availability to meet user satisfaction and business requirements.
user_story: As a User, I want Experience high system availability and performance, so that Achieve user satisfaction above 4.5/5

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given the system is operational, when the user interacts with it, then the system should be available at least 95% of the time.
Given a user submits a request, when the system processes it, then the approval time should be under 24 hours.
Given the system is available, when the user uses it, then the manual processing should be reduced by 50%.
